name: Stan Shih
title: Cofounder of the Acer Group
intro: Stan Shih is the Chairman of Stan Shih Foundation, Cofounder & Honorary Chairman of the Acer Group. Mr. Shih serves on the boards of Acer, the former boards of TSMC. He is the Chairman of Cloud Gate Culture and Art Foundation and the head of One Song Orchestra Fun Club. Besides, he acts as commissioner of the Reform for Resilience Commission and Director of CAPRI. Time featured Mr. Shih in its article “60 years of Asian Hero’s” for turning Taiwan into a PC manufacturing powerhouse. He is awarded “Taiwan Cultural Collaboration Medal” by the Ministry of Culture of Taiwan in 2021. Mr. Shih earned a Bachelor’s Master and honorary Ph D in Electronics engineering from National Chiao Tung University in Taiwan. He was awarded an Honorary Doctorate of Technology by Hong Kong Polytechnic University, and an Honorary Doctor of International Law from the Thousand School of Global Management.

seminar.topic: From Wangdao Perspective to the Competitiveness of Taiwan
seminar.introduction: “New Wangdao” talks about the leadership thinking of any organization by “creating values, balancing current interest and sustaining future development.” In the perspective of Wangdao, there are six criteria to measure the total value of contributions: “visible, direct and current” values, and “invisible, indirect and future” values, while the later is much more important.
